presentationImage.alt: A primary button in its default state, with a solid blue background and white label text reading Save.

presentationVideo.alt: A user clicks a primary button labeled Save. The label is replaced by a spinner animation while the button maintains its width. After two seconds, the spinner is replaced by a checkmark and the label changes to Saved.
